artifacts.description: Removed IRR case from derivation_subst (eliminated 1 sorry)
Removed IRR cases and IRRSoundness import
Removed IRR cases from substDerivation and liftDerivationWith

Completed fresh_Gp_seed_consistent proof using substitution argument. Refactored exists_strict_fresh_atom to include freshness. 3 sorries remain: exists_fresh_for_g_content (freshness existence), fresh_for_g_content_some_decided_false (finding decided-false fresh atom), naming_set_consistent (legacy, unused).
Phase 4 analysis and proof strategy handoff

partial_progress.details: Completed fresh_Gp_seed_consistent proof (Case 1 was the blocker). Key insight: G(¬G(q)) ∈ M implies ¬G(q) ∈ g_content(M), which puts q in atoms_of_set(g_content(M)), contradicting freshness. existsTask_strict_fresh_atom now compiles with only upstream sorries in freshness existence.
key_insights: fresh_Gp_seed_consistent Case 1: if L' ⊢ ¬G(q), then G(¬G(q)) ∈ M via generalized K + T-axiom
G(¬G(q)) ∈ M means ¬G(q) ∈ g_content(M), putting q in its atoms
This contradicts q being fresh for g_content(M)
exists_fresh_for_g_content requires proving countable-union-of-finite ≠ all atoms
fresh_for_g_content_some_decided_false requires showing some fresh atom is decided false
remaining_sorries_in_file: exists_fresh_for_g_content (line 312): needs cardinality argument or seed-based reasoning
fresh_for_g_content_some_decided_false (line 668): depends on exists_fresh_for_g_content + finding neg in M
naming_set_consistent (line 512): legacy, not used in new approach

verification.notes: Build passes. fresh_Gp_seed_consistent proven. existsTask_strict_fresh_atom calls sorried helpers. 3 sorries in CanonicalIrreflexivity.lean (down from 5), 1 is legacy (naming_set_consistent).

review_reason: Phase 4 key theorem fresh_Gp_seed_consistent is PROVEN. Remaining sorries are freshness existence lemmas requiring either cardinality arguments or additional hypotheses about MCS construction.
